Observed food not protected from contamination during storage by not being covered in a container, by being in a package, or wrapping. Location: plastic bins in dry food storage area and in spices storage area. Food Item: various rice, grains and spices.

Observed holes or other gaps in the structure of the facility. Location: wall area in chemical storage room. Size: one inch or less openings around piping. The presence of insects and rodents is minimized by protecting outer openings to the food establishment. Outer openings of a food establishment shall be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by having solid, self-closing, tight-fitting doors. Instructed PIC to repair or replace the doors so that they are solid, self-closing, and tight-fitting. Light should not be seen through the door when closed. Self-closing doors are not required when they are exit doors that are solid and tight-fitting, designated as an emergency exit, or have limited use. Observed back door to the outside is not tight fitting, light can be seen at the bottom edges.
